prompt: Create a typography design for a modern jazz festival poster inspired by the Art TypographyDeco era, incorporating geometric shapes, clean lines, and elegant symmetry as showcased in the reference image.
prompt_refined: Create a typography design for a modern jazz festival poster in a distinct Art Deco graphic style, drawing specific inspiration from image 1. The poster should feature bold, all-caps, geometric sans-serif typography for the main title, placed prominently at the top. A central, highly stylized graphic element, characterized by clean lines, elegant symmetry, and patterns similar to the radiating and shell-like motifs in image 1, should be integrated. The design must adhere to a limited color palette of black, a muted red (like the coral/terra cotta in image 1), and an off-white background. Include supporting text for dates and artists at the bottom, maintaining the overall symmetrical layout and the strong decorative border seen in image 1.
objects: Bold, all-caps, geometric sans-serif typography (main title at top)
Supporting text (dates and artists at bottom)
